servinfo.title: Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits (Ignition Switch Model)

servinfosub.title: Voltage and Signal Check
servinfosub.ptxt: Check voltage and/or pulse signal of BCM (1) using voltmeter (2) and oscilloscope (3).

item.ptxt: Confirm that battery voltage is 11 V or more.
The voltage of terminal with asterisk (*) cannot be measured by voltmeter because it is pulse signal. Check it with oscilloscope if necessary.

entry.ptxt: Front and side turn signal light signal (R)
Power supply for turn signal light
Refer to Oil pressure switch signal .
Front and side turn signal light signal (L)
Ground for outside air temperature sensor

Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal, rear defogger switch signal, power door lock switch signal, driver key cylinder switch signal, driver door switch signal and driver seat belt buckle switch signal .
Brake fluid level: Lower than MIN level
Signal for keyless entry receiver (if equipped)
Refer to Keyless entry receiver signal and power supply signal .
Passenger seat belt reminder light signal (if equipped)
Passenger seat belt reminder light: ON
Passenger seat belt reminder light: OFF
Blower speed selector: Other than OFF position

Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal, rear defogger switch signal, power door lock switch signal, driver key cylinder switch signal, driver door switch signal and driver seat belt buckle switch signal .
Refer to Hazard warning switch signal, turn signal switch signal, passenger seat belt buckle switch signal, rear wiper switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal .
Power supply for keyless entry receiver
Refer to Keyless entry receiver signal and power supply signal .
Refer to Hazard warning switch signal, turn signal switch signal, passenger seat belt buckle switch signal, rear wiper switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal .
Refer to Hazard warning switch signal, turn signal switch signal, passenger seat belt buckle switch signal, rear wiper switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal .
Passenger seat belt buckle switch signal (if equipped)
Refer to Hazard warning switch signal, turn signal switch signal, passenger seat belt buckle switch signal, rear wiper switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal .
Refer to Hazard warning switch signal, turn signal switch signal, passenger seat belt buckle switch signal, rear wiper switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal .
Ignition key: Inserted to ignition key cylinder
Ignition key: Pulled out from ignition key cylinder
Other than driver door lock actuator control (Unlock)
Unlock signal is output for rear door lock actuator
Power supply for door lock actuator

Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal, rear defogger switch signal, power door lock switch signal, driver key cylinder switch signal, driver door switch signal and driver seat belt buckle switch signal .
Driver door key cylinder switch signal (Lock)

Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal, rear defogger switch signal, power door lock switch signal, driver key cylinder switch signal, driver door switch signal and driver seat belt buckle switch signal .
Driver door key cylinder switch: “Lock” position
Refer to Rear end door switch signal and parking brake switch signal .

Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal, rear defogger switch signal, power door lock switch signal, driver key cylinder switch signal, driver door switch signal and driver seat belt buckle switch signal .
Rear end door opener switch signal
Refer to Hazard warning switch signal, turn signal switch signal, passenger seat belt buckle switch signal, rear wiper switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal .
Rear end door opener switch: Pushed
Rear end door opener actuator control
Rear end door opener actuator: In operation
Unlock signal is output for driver door lock actuator
Lock signal is output for all door lock actuator

Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal, rear defogger switch signal, power door lock switch signal, driver key cylinder switch signal, driver door switch signal and driver seat belt buckle switch signal .
Driver door key cylinder switch signal (Unlock)

Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal, rear defogger switch signal, power door lock switch signal, driver key cylinder switch signal, driver door switch signal and driver seat belt buckle switch signal .
Driver door key cylinder switch: “Unlock” position
Driver seat belt buckle switch signal

Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal, rear defogger switch signal, power door lock switch signal, driver key cylinder switch signal, driver door switch signal and driver seat belt buckle switch signal .
Other than driver door switch signal
Refer to Other than driver door switch signal .
Refer to Rear end door switch signal and parking brake switch signal .

topic.title: Oscilloscope display
topic.ptxt: Shown below is typical waveform display provided by oscilloscope.

item.ptxt: How to read waveforms is shown below.
Waveforms may vary with measurement conditions and vehicle specifications.

topic.title: Brake fluid level switch signal, rear defogger switch signal, power door lock switch signal, driver key cylinder switch signal, driver door switch signal and driver seat belt buckle switch signal

item.ptxt: Brake fluid level switch: OFF (brake fluid level: higher than MIN level)

table.title: Driver door key cylinder switch signal (Lock):

item.ptxt: Driver door key cylinder switch (Lock): OFF

table.title: Driver door key cylinder switch signal (Unlock):

item.ptxt: Driver door key cylinder switch (Unlock): OFF

table.title: Driver seat belt buckle switch signal:

topic.title: Keyless entry receiver signal and power supply signal

item.ptxt: Keyless entry transmitter: “Lock” or “Unlock” button is pushed

topic.title: Hazard warning switch signal, turn signal switch signal, passenger seat belt buckle switch signal, rear wiper switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal

table.title: Passenger seat belt buckle switch signal:

item.ptxt: Rear wiper switch: Other than INT position

table.title: Rear end door opener switch signal:

item.ptxt: Rear end door opener switch: Released

topic.title: Rear end door switch signal and parking brake switch signal
Other than driver door switch signal
